THE Asia University Rankings501–600 (2025)--
National Ranking
NIRF Overall Rankings101-150 (2025)--
NIRF Engineering Rankings65 (2025)45 (2024)
Outlook India's Top Govt. Engineering Colleges25 (2025)25 (2024)
India Today Top Engineering Colleges21 (2025)22 (2024)

MODE OF ADMISSION

  • Candidates must appear for the JEE (Main) exam and either secure at least 75% marks (65% for SC/ST/PwD) in Class XII or be within the category-wise top 20 percentile in their respective Class XII board examination. For more details, refer to the JEE Main Performance Criteria in Class XII.
  • Admissions are based on the rank obtained in JEE (Main) through JoSAA Counselling and CSAB Special Round.

COURSES OFFERED

Please choose the course.

B.E./B.Tech. - 4 Years

  • Aerospace Engineering
  • Artificial Intelligence and Data Science
  • Civil Engineering
  • Computer Science and Engineering
  • Electrical Engineering
  • Electronics and Communication Engineering
  • Mechanical Engineering
  • VLSI Design and Technology

FEE STRUCTURE

Institute Fee

ParticularsAmount
Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹20,000
One-Time Fees₹1,200
Tuition Fee (per Semester)₹62,500
Other Fees (per Semester)₹16,500
Annual Fees₹1,000
Total₹1,01,200

Hostel Fee

ParticularsAmount
Hostel Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹10,000
Mess Caution Money (One-Time, Refundable)₹10,000
Hostel Charges (per Semester)₹18,000
Total₹38,000

Fee Waivers

  • 100% Tuition Fee waiver for SC/ST/PwD students.
  • 100% Tuition Fee remission for Most Economically Backward students with family income less than ₹1 lakh per annum.
  • 2/3rd Tuition Fee remission for Other Economically Backward students with family income between ₹1 lakh to ₹5 lakh per annum.

PLACEMENTS

  • 2024
  • Older

Highlights

  • Rs. 50.00 Lakhs per Annum offered to 1 student by D.E. Shaw
  • Rs. 44.00 Lakhs per Annum offered to 2 students by Intuit
  • Rs. 35.00 Lakhs per Annum offered to 2 students by Arm Technologies
  • Rs. 34.00 Lakhs per Annum offered to 4 students by Meesho
  • Rs. 30.00 Lakhs per Annum offered to 1 student by GAN Studio
  • Rs. 25.91 Lakhs per Annum offered to 1 student by MathWorks
  • Rs. 24.00 Lakhs per Annum offered to 1 student by Goldman Sachs
  • Rs. 23.50 Lakhs per Annum offered to 2 students by Zscaler
  • Rs. 23.00 Lakhs per Annum offered to 5 students by MakeMyTrip
